category_sources: Official docs describe Marked as a Markdown compiler/parser and CLI; source_facts.description says Markdown parser and compiler.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title uses "Marked Documentation"; GitHub repo is markedjs/marked.
docs_sources: Official homepage is a dedicated documentation site with getting started, usage, options, security, and API-style sections.
repo_sources: Official docs link to the markedjs/marked GitHub project; source_facts.repo was empty so repo was determined from official sources.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Markdown parsing/compilation, JavaScript/browser/Node usage, and CLI installation/usage; source_facts.executables lists marked.
